   | |
35 | |             .left
36 | |             .as_ref()
37 | |             .unwrap()
38 | |             .borrow()

39 |               .count
40 |       };
   |       -- ... and the borrow might be used here, when that temporary is dropped and runs the destructor for type `Ref<'_, TNode>`
   |       |
   |       `sp_borrow` dropped here while still borrowed
   |
   = note: the temporary is part of an expression at the end of a block;

   |

35 |             .left
...
38 |             .borrow()
39 ~             .count; x
   |
